headline: Is Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) Undervalued After Its Russell Index Removals?
summary: Index removals put Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings in focus Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) has been removed from several Russell growth benchmarks, including the Russell Midcap Growth and Russell 3000 Growth indexes, putting passive index ownership and trading flows under closer scrutiny. For existing and prospective investors, these index changes prompt a closer look at how Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings is currently valued, how its recent share performance compares with peers, and...
